name: BN load (Баруун наран /Зүүн/)

decision.binding_now: low fleet utilisation + active-cycle waste (queue / road)

recommendations.lever: Smooth arrivals + cut the load queue (dispatch / headway control)
recommendations.mechanism: de-bunch convoys so trucks meet the shovel evenly, cutting the wait at the loader
recommendations.anchor: truck-shovel dispatch & queueing theory (bunching wastes shovel capacity)
recommendations.caveat: within the current fleet availability; no capex.
recommendations.throughput_effect: part of the active-cycle ceiling 81 -> 124 loads/day (+54%)
recommendations.note: within current fleet availability; no capex

recommendations.lever: Haul-road improvement (empty return + loaded haul; surface/grade/width at terminals)
recommendations.mechanism: raise haul speed toward free-flow; the delay is concentrated at the two terminals, the open road is already efficient
recommendations.anchor: haul-road rolling / grade resistance vs truck productivity
recommendations.caveat: helps only where the haul is long (BN, not Middling); capped by the shovel ceiling.
recommendations.note: within current fleet availability; capped by shovel ceiling

recommendations.lever: Run more productive truck-hours (add/extend shifts, more available trucks)
recommendations.mechanism: the fleet is parked/off-shift a large share of the month; more productive truck-hours raise output toward the shovel ceiling
recommendations.anchor: fleet availability / utilisation (theory of constraints — feed the constraint)
recommendations.caveat: a scheduling & staffing decision, NOT dispatch tuning; some standstill is legitimate (maintenance, rest, blasting).
recommendations.throughput_effect: 124 -> up to the shovel ceiling 160/day (staffing/scheduling, not dispatch)

recommendations.lever: Expand loading capacity (2nd loading position / faster load / bigger bucket)
recommendations.mechanism: raise the shovel service rate = raise the throughput ceiling
recommendations.anchor: theory of constraints — elevate the binding constraint
recommendations.caveat: capex; only pays ABOVE the current shovel ceiling.
recommendations.prereq: only after throughput reaches the shovel ceiling 160

caveats: idle split at PARK_CAP=6h is a provisional, BN-tuned threshold (make cycle-relative when generalising)
realistic ceiling assumes current fleet availability + constant service rate
downtime = fleet off-shift/parked, addressed by staffing not dispatch
DIAGNOSTIC not proof — needs before/after pilot
